caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black table. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five stars and the words "UNICORN HUSTLE" repeated vertically. To his right, a sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black mug with "BOSS TALK" text sits on the table. The man is speaking, and his facial expressions and head movements shift slightly across the sequence; he begins by looking slightly to his left, turns further toward the right, and then returns to a more centered position while continuing to talk. A small logo containing the text "BOSS TALK" is visible in the bottom left of each scene.
